title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Prudential Life Global Group - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Prudential Life Global Group - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Prudential Life Global Group:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group!
